manual_cross_check.name: Google Scholar
manual_cross_check.observation: The public profile exposed 200 rows across its paginated result set, including duplicate versions, talks, translations, and research statements.

source_provenance.note: Google Scholar is linked for discovery and citation counts and was manually cross-checked, but is not imported automatically because it has no supported public API and its result rows are not a deduplicated publication record.
